zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Mortimer於1198年之前出生在英國賀福爾維格莫時，他的父親Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor39歲，母親Isabella de Ferrers31歲。他於1225年與Gwladys ferch Llywelyn在威爾士結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1246年8月6日在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Mortimer于1198年之前出生在英国賀福爾維格莫时，他的父亲Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor39岁，母亲Isabella de Ferrers31岁。他于1225年与Gwladys ferch Llywelyn在威尔士结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1246年8月6日在他的家乡，埋葬在英国賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Mortimer was born before 1198, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor, was 39 and his mother, Isabella de Ferrers, was 31. He married Gwladys ferch Llywelyn in 1225, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 6 August 1246, in his hometown, and was buried in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Mortimer est né avant 1198, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Ferrers, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Gwladys ferch Llywelyn en 1225, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 6 août 1246, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Mortimer vor 1198 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor 39 und seine Mutter Isabella de Ferrers 31. Er hat 1225 in Wales Gwladys ferch Llywelyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. August 1246 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Mortimer è nato il prima del 1198 nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de Ferrers, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Gwladys ferch Llywelyn nel 1225, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 agosto 1246, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Mortimerが1198年以前にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmorは39歳，母Isabella de Ferrersは31歳であった。1225年にウェールズでGwladys ferch Llywelynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1246年8月6日に故郷で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーウィグモー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Mortimer(이)가 1198년 이전 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Ferrers(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1225년 웨일스에서 Gwladys ferch Llywelyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1246년 8월 6일 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 위그모어 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Mortimer nasceu antes 1198, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Ferrers, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwladys ferch Llywelyn em 1225, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1246, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Mortimer родился перед 1198 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Ferrers, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwladys ferch Llywelyn в 1225 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 августа 1246 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности вигмор эбби, вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Mortimer nació antes de 1198, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Mortimer Lord of Wigmor, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Isabella de Ferrers, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Gwladys ferch Llywelyn en 1225, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1246, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
